title: Mexican Bliss Salsa
description: A tangy and spicy salsa made with bliss, gherkin, and a hint of garlic. Perfect for topping tacos or grilled meats.
instructions: Mince the garlic and mix with the bliss and gherkin in a bowl.
Squeeze a lime juice over the mixture and stir well.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
